results.title: ElevenLabs: Create natural AI voices instantly in any language | Product Hunt
results.content:
7

12

View all

4.9

Based on 187 reviews

Review ElevenLabs?

Leave a review

Reviewers mostly praise ElevenLabs for voices that sound unusually natural and expressive, with a large voice library, strong voice cloning, fast processing, and easy API or workflow integration for podcasts, videos, stories, and agent-style apps. Several users say it beats tools like Polly, Google Cloud TTS, and PlayHT on realism. The main complaints are consistency: long passages, repeated sessions, numbers, abbreviations, pronunciations, and some non-English output can drift or sound worse. A few also mention weak accent control, account issues, and one sharply negative complaint about confusing credit usage and unresponsive support.

Top Product Categories [...] DAYANAND M K

•1 review

#### What's great

Tried ElevenLabs recently for voiceovers and honestly the realism is impressive. The emotional tone and pauses sound much more natural compared to most TTS tools I’ve tested. I especially liked how easy the API integration and multilingual support were for experimenting with AI agent workflows and narration projects.

One thing I noticed is that long-form consistency can still vary slightly, especially with numbers or certain pronunciations, but overall it feels like one of the strongest voice AI products out there right now.

#### What needs improvement
